---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's the gap, friction, or missing thing? Frame it in terms of the user's experience.

## Proposed solution

How would you address it? Concrete is better than abstract.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one wins.

## Surface impact

Roughly which files / systems would change? (See [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) §3 for the architecture map.)

## Out of scope

What this change does **not** include. Helps keep PRs focused.
